kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Wulfric goes with at least two of Blacksmith, Horseshoes, and Riverside.
Blacksmith goes with exactly two of Matilda, Anvil, Rope, Kingsford, and 2 coins.
The artisan who makes Candles' levy is lower than both the Mason and the artisan in Eastcheap.
The artisan with the Mallet's levy is between the artisan in Riverside and the artisan who makes Horseshoes.
If Wulfric does not go with Fletcher, then someone in the Clothiers' Guild goes with Cedric.
Horseshoes, Rope, and Kingsford go with Rowan, Blacksmith, and Fletcher, in some order.
Exactly one of these is true: Cedric goes with Anvil; Rowan goes with Boots; Blacksmith goes with Riverside.
Matilda, Loom, Boots, and 3 coins belong to different artisans.
At most one member of the Ironmongers' Guild is in the River Ward.
